title: Calamintha neorotundifolia
intro: Calamintha neorotundifolia, also known as Roundleaf Calamint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as relieving digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The bioactive constituents of Calamintha neorotundifolia include diterpenes, flavonoids, and essential oils, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. The plant is commonly used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and stress.
